title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Notice of Branch Closure (FR 4031; OMB No. 7100-0264).
action: On November 27, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 51328) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 4031. The comment period for this notice expired on January 16, 2026. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2026-05175
title_normalized: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
bm25_text: 2026-05175 Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB On November 27, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 51328) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 4031. The comment period for this notice expired on January 16, 2026. The Board did not receive any comments. The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Notice of Branch Closure (FR 4031; OMB No. 7100-0264).
